name: add_component
description: Add a component to an existing GameObject in the current scene. Can add built-in Unity components (e.g. Rigidbody, BoxCollider, AudioSource) or custom script components by their class name. The script must already exist in the project.

game_object_name.description: The name of the GameObject to add the component to. Searches the entire scene hierarchy.

component_type.description: The type name of the component to add, e.g. 'Rigidbody', 'BoxCollider', 'AudioSource', or a custom script class name like 'PlayerController'.
